actions.label: Trim AMD
actions.detail: AMD up 6.6% to $552.05 trades at 80.8x P/E and 52.1x EV/EBITDA versus NVDA's 34.3x EV/EBITDA despite far lower margins (12.5% net margin vs 55.6%) and ROIC (6.8% vs 93.96%). Take profits into rotation-driven strength.

actions.label: Buy QCOM on dips
actions.detail: QCOM at $186.48 trades at just 33.8x earnings and 14.0x EV/EBITDA, cheapest quality name in the group, with 28% operating margin, 23.3% ROE, and a 2.08% dividend yield backed by 91.5% FCF/OCF conversion. Accumulate on pullback toward $175-180.

actions.label: Hold TSM core position
actions.detail: TSM up 4.06% to $451.79 with 50.8% operating margin, 44.6% net margin, and 35.1% ROE — best profitability/scale combination in semis and irreplaceable foundry supplier to NVDA, AMD, AAPL, QCOM. Hold as structural anchor.

actions.label: Avoid Intel longs
actions.detail: INTC bounced 1.54% to $122.20 but remains operating-margin negative (-0.04%), ROE negative (-0.23%), and FCF/OCF negative (-51%). Trades at only 1.46x book versus peers at 5-29x, reflecting justified skepticism on turnaround. Avoid chasing strength.

actions.label: Watch ASML for entry
actions.detail: ASML up 3.15% to $1825.07 with best-in-class 51.6% ROIC and 50.5% ROE from EUV monopoly, but trades at 43.1x earnings. Watch for pullback toward $1650-1700 or export-policy risk before adding.

watchlist_adds.reason: Monitor for pullback entry given EUV monopoly and best-in-class capital returns, but rich valuation and China export-policy risk
Track foundry customer wins and capacity utilization before considering re-entry given persistent negative FCF
